metadata.title: Portfolio | Dmytro - Frontend Developer
metadata.description: Frontend developer portfolio showcasing projects and skills

about.title: About Me
paragraphs: I'm a frontend developer focused on building clean, performant web applications with React and Next.js.
With experience in TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, and modern tooling, I create interfaces that are both functional and visually refined.

items.title: Дмитро Тютюн — Official Website
items.description: Official website for a Ukrainian stand-up comedian and blogger (200K+ YouTube subscribers). Features tour schedule with tickets, video section, merch store, and social links. Styled with branded animations, film grain effect, and custom sketch borders.

items.title: BullyChat
items.description: AI-powered chat application supporting Groq LLM provider with markdown rendering and math expressions.

items.title: Frontend Error Observatory
items.description: Error monitoring dashboard for frontend applications with real-time data, JSON viewer, dark mode, and responsive UI.

items.title: СТО на Дорожній
items.description: Business website for a car service station with service catalog, pricing, FAQ, and contact form. Ukrainian localization.

items.title: Contrlve Game
items.description: A fan web game based on a popular Ukrainian show. Features turn-based logic, complex state transitions, and frame-accurate animations.

points: Designed and implemented a multi-level product filtering system with nested sub-filters using URL params for state persistence (SSR-compatible).
Built and maintained a Next.js component library integrating 5+ REST APIs using Axios and custom hooks.
Refactored 15+ legacy components reducing code duplication by ~25% and implemented Jest/RTL unit tests.
Took AI-powered internal interfaces from zero to production using Next.js App Router, TypeScript, and Zustand.
Improved Lighthouse score from 65 → 88 and reduced LCP by 40% through lazy loading and code splitting.
Built a production integration with a GrammyJS Telegram bot for automated lead delivery.
Delivered 20+ pixel-perfect components from Figma with complex UI interactions and cross-browser compatibility.
Ran regular code reviews for a 3-developer team, enforcing semantic HTML5 and a11y standards.

contact.heading: Get in Touch
contact.description: Have a project in mind or want to collaborate? Feel free to reach out.
